justification: All pass criteria met: prototype pollution identified by name, __proto__ attack vector explained with concrete payload, global Object.prototype mutation impact explained, safe merge fix with key blacklist recommended, specific curl-based attack example provided, safe_to_deploy false.

observations.text: Excellent concrete attack payload: {"__proto__": {"isAdmin": true}} with curl reproduction
Clearly explains the full chain: for...in iterates __proto__, recurses into Object.prototype, affects ALL objects process-wide
Fix is specific and actionable: key blacklist + hasOwnProperty guard + schema validation
Goes beyond requirements by identifying mass-assignment and array corruption as additional findings
Correctly identifies the falsy value merge bug as an important secondary issue
Suggests replacing hand-rolled deepMerge with battle-tested library or simple spread for flat schema
